options.label: Discontinued
options.description: Robot is no longer in production but may still be available as remaining stock or used

options.label: Limited Availability
options.description: Robot is produced in small quantities or only available to specific customers or regions

options.label: Pre-order
options.description: Robot has been announced and can be ordered but is not yet shipping to customers

options.label: In Production
options.description: Robot is currently being manufactured and is available for purchase through normal channels

options.label: Prototype
options.description: Robot exists as a working prototype or demonstration unit but is not yet commercially available

options.label: Coming Soon
options.description: Robot has been officially announced with planned release but cannot yet be ordered
